COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-18-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Jefferey Chen, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Michael Younessian, also present.
John Bell, Esq. for Defendant: Lay Giok Ghing, also present.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Parties agreed to mutually dismiss each other with prejudice, dismissal to be filed within 30 days.
Plaintiff waived rent damages form Feb. 2005 through July 2007.
Each to bear their own fees and costs.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is placed on the Dismissal Calendar on Sept. 18, 2007 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Jeffrey A. Chen, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR#7165.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Oct-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
John T. Bell, appeared for Defendant/moving party
Jeffrey Chen, appeared for Plaintiff/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held. Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions, To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to the form and special interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $636.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
